series_metadata.series_title: Valid With & Without Photo Drivers License/IDs
series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of an "Out of State Application For Drivers License"(BMV 2002) and any supporting documentation needed for the issuance of an original, renewal, duplicate, down grade, or commerical valid with or without photo drivers license and identification card in accordance with section 4506.06, 4507.06, and 4507.21 of the O R C. Refunds issued to applicants for out of state requests that were not processed due to time limits or incomplete requests are also included.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper records that are not microfilmed for 7 years, then destroy. Retain paper records that are microfilmed for 2 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: At the time application is made to obtain a drivers license, the information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained for a period of eight (8) years, and then purged. ; Microform: Retain microfilm for 7 years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
